questionHtml: Calculate the actual thickness of the leaf, from upper to lower surface along the line a–b, showing your working.
markschemeHtml:
1.  correct measurement of the line on the image (+/-1mm);
  2.  correct calculation and including units;

Allow ECF – ruler measurements +/- 1mm
